name: Delaware Cream Cheese-Pineapple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, combine sugar and cornstarch with crushed pineapple and juice. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until the mixture thickens and becomes clear. Allow it to cool; set aside.
2. In a mixing bowl, blend softened cream cheese, sugar, and salt. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition. Stir in milk and vanilla. If the mixture appears slightly curdled, do not worry—this will bake out.
3. Spread the cooled pineapple layer over the bottom of the pie shell. Pour the cream cheese mixture over the pineapple and sprinkle with pecans.
4. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 50 minutes. Allow to cool.
